'''Landau''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Landau was stationed on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to oversee the recruitment of new [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cilas Veckon|Veckon's]] push for additional enlistments. Landau's main office was located near the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]].
